PROJEYİ KEŞFET

Prestijin Yeni Adresi

BEYKOZ PRIVE

PROJEYİ KEŞFET
Who We Are

Building On Experience,
Building With Integrity

With over a decade of trusted experience, JRM Construction Management has quickly grown to become one of the top general contracting & construction management firms in New York City, New Jersey, California, Florida, and across the US. The cornerstones of our business are solid construction and excellence in on-site management. We bring our clients the expertise and full capabilities of a large firm, while maintaining a boutique firm approach with top-down involvement. Meaning at JRM, ou­­r teams work collaboratively on all projects both small and large from principals and directors to project managers, estimators, supers, and our laborers on-site.

At JRM, we believe that the key to success is the adaptability of our dedicated employees and the extensive industry knowledge they apply to strategically constructing innovative solutions for unforeseen challenges. From our headquarters in New York City, to our offices in New Jersey, California, and Florida serving clients nationwide, all of our teams are committed to delivering JRM’s standard of excellence on every job, regardless of size, scope or complexity.

learn more about us

ACC'nin Referansları

Tüm Referanslara Göz At
Hizmetlerimiz

Turning Client
Ideas
Into Reality

Tüm Hizmetler

As one of the top contractors in New York, New Jersey, California, and Florida, JRM prides itself on delivering a complete range of construction services to our client base nationwide, from respected property owners & developers to Fortune 500 corporations, media & tech firms, major law firms, leading luxury retailers, renowned hospitality groups, life sciences & health care organizations, and financial services firms.

Preconstruction

We’ll work closely with your team to plan out this critical construction phase with a keen emphasis on cost estimating & management as well as logistical planning. We’ll provide all budgeting from schematic design straight through to construction documents.

Preconstruction

We’ll work closely with your team to plan out this critical construction phase with a keen emphasis on cost estimating & management as well as logistical planning. We’ll provide all budgeting from schematic design straight through to construction documents.

Construction Management

We’ll work closely with your team to plan out this critical construction phase with a keen emphasis on cost estimating & management as well as logistical planning. We’ll provide all budgeting from schematic design straight through to construction documents.

We’ll work closely with your team to plan out this critical construction phase with a keen emphasis on cost estimating & management as well as logistical planning. We’ll provide all budgeting from schematic design straight through to construction documents.

We’ll work closely with your team to plan out this critical construction phase with a keen emphasis on cost estimating & management as well as logistical planning. We’ll provide all budgeting from schematic design straight through to construction documents.
Who We Are

Building On Experience,
Building With Integrity

With over a decade of trusted experience, JRM Construction Management has quickly grown to become one of the top general contracting & construction management firms in New York City, New Jersey, California, Florida, and across the US. The cornerstones of our business are solid construction and excellence in on-site management. We bring our clients the expertise and full capabilities of a large firm, while maintaining a boutique firm approach with top-down involvement. Meaning at JRM, ou­­r teams work collaboratively on all projects both small and large from principals and directors to project managers, estimators, supers, and our laborers on-site.

With over a decade of trusted experience, JRM Construction Management has quickly grown to become one of the top general contracting & construction management firms in New York City, New Jersey, California, Florida, and across the US. The cornerstones of our business are solid construction and excellence in on-site management. We bring our clients the expertise and full capabilities of a large firm, while maintaining a boutique firm approach with top-down involvement. The Heart of our Culture

Our Employees Are The Key To JRM's Success

As an employee owned company, we know that our dedicated employees are what make JRM one of the best general contracting & construction management companies in the industry. We strive to build a company we’re proud to call our own and believe in the importance of investing in people and their future. We offer our employees industry leading benefits from our employee stock ownership program to competitive salaries, mentoring from industry experts and advancement opportunities.

At JRM, we truly believe that the key to success is creating a positive work culture where our team of tight-knit employees foster open communication across all levels, from principals and directors to associates and junior professionals. Through our atmosphere of collaboration our team’s have completed a number of exciting high-profile projects including the Shops & Restaurants at Hudson Yards, One World Observatory, Major League Baseball’s Headquarters, along with projects for the NBA, Ferrari, Porsche, and SONY to name a few.
